themes.label: Worship
themes.summary: This chapter gives prominence to praise, worship, thanksgiving, or blessing God’s name. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Praise ye the LORD. Praise, O ye servants of the LORD, praise the name of the LORD. This tria...". Cross references echo "Glory".

2: Blessed be the name of the Lord From this time on and forever
3: The name of the Lord is to be praised

themes.label: Creation

Commentary leans on "Augustine of Hippo on Exposition on Psalm 113: "The Lord is high above all heathen" [Psalm 11...".
